servinfo.title: Air outlet ports do not change or do not agree with air flow selector’s position even if air flow selector is changed

condition.ptxt: Air outlet ports do not change or do not agree with air flow selector’s position even if air flow selector is changed

ps.ptxt: Broken or bent air flow control cable
Incorrect installation of air flow control cable

action.ptxt: Check position of cable and adjust it if necessary.

ps.ptxt: Broken air flow control door assembly

action.ptxt: Repair air flow control door assembly.
